attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
 WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD,
 WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,
 WDNRTFR.GL_DTM, 
 WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
 WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM,
 WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
 WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 WDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE,
 WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
 WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
 WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
 WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 WDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
 WDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT,
 WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME,
 WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
 WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
 WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
 WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
 WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
 WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 WDNRTFR.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 WDNRTFR.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WDNRTFR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM,
 WDNRTFR.ACTION_CODE,
 WDNRTFR.DML_TYPE,
 WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT,
 CAST( WDNRTFR.GL_DTM AS DATE) GL_DT ,
 WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WDNRTFR.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 WDNRTFR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_EL_DRVD_NCR_RT_FOR_RV_OOD   WDNRTFR
 WHERE 
 WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD <> 'GL'

SELECT
WDNRTINV.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY,
WDNRTINV.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
WDNRTINV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD,
WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
WDNRTINV.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
WDNRTINV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
WDNRTINV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTINV.LINE_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTINV.SPLIT_PCT,
WDNRTINV.GL_DTM,	
WDNRTINV.GL_POSTED_DTM,
WDNRTINV.RULE_START_DTM,
WDNRTINV.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
WDNRTINV.LAST_RECORD_FLG,
WDNRTINV.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
WDNRTINV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
WDNRTINV.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE,
WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WDNRTINV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WDNRTINV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WDNRTINV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_KEY,
WDNRTINV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
WDNRTINV.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
WDNRTINV.PRODUCT_KEY,
WDNRTINV.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTINV.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
WDNRTINV.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
WDNRTINV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
WDNRTINV.DV_MISC_FLG,
WDNRTINV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
WDNRTINV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
WDNRTINV.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
WDNRTINV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
WDNRTINV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
WDNRTINV.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG,
WDNRTINV.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
WDNRTINV.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
WDNRTINV.SHIPPED_DT,
WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTINV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
WDNRTINV.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME,
WDNRTINV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
WDNRTINV.MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
WDNRTINV.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY,
WDNRTINV.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTINV.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTINV.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,
WDNRTINV.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
WDNRTINV.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
WDNRTINV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
WDNRTINV.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
WDNRTINV.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
WDNRTINV.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
WDNRTINV.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WDNRTINV.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WDNRTINV.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
WDNRTINV.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WDNRTINV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
WDNRTINV.SALES_REP_NUM,
WDNRTINV.ACTION_CODE,
WDNRTINV.DML_TYPE,
WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_DT,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
WDNRTINV.GL_DT,
WDNRTINV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT,
WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
WDNRTINV.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
WDNRTINV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE		
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_INV_OOD   WDNRTINV
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON ( WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	WHERE (
NOT EXISTS 
	( SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC	
	WHERE NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD	)
OR
NOT EXISTS 
	( SELECT '1' FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_RV_OOD  WOXRTR
	WHERE WDNRTINV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = WOXRTR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
	AND WOXRTR.GLOBAL_NAME  = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS 
	( SELECT '1' FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT,
	 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE  NATT
	 WHERE NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
	 )
OR
NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT '1' FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER    NSORD,
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE   NSOT
	WHERE WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORD.SALES_ORDER_KEY
	AND NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
	)
)

SELECT
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,GL.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,GL.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,CASE WHEN GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY<0 THEN -999 ELSE GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,GL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,GL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,GL.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,GL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,GL.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,GL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,GL.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,GL.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,GL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,GL.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,GL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,GL.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,GL.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,GL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,GL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,GL.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,GL.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,GL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME             
,GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,GL.GL_DT                         
,GL.BK_SS_CD                      
,GL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,GL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,GL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,GL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,GL.TRANSACTION_DT                
,GL.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,GL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      
,GL.SPLIT_PCT                     
,GL.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,GL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,GL.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       
,GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,GL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,GL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,GL.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,GL.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,GL.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,GL.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,GL.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,GL.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     
,GL.DSV_FLG                       
,GL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,GL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,CMN.NEW_XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                 
,CMN.NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME       
,CMN.NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG      
,CMN.NEW_ELA_FLG AS ELA_FLG
,GL.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */ 
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
,GL.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE GL, 
$$STGDB.WI_INV_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_OOD CMN	
WHERE 
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_INV_REV_MEASURE WGL
WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
AND WGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)

SELECT
  REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
 ,REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
 ,REV_TRX.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 ,REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
 ,REV_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
 ,REV_TRX.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
 ,REV_TRX.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
 ,REV_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
 ,REV_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
 ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
 ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
 ,REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
 ,REV_TRX.DD_GL_DATETIME                
 ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
 ,REV_TRX.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
 ,REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
 ,REV_TRX.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
 ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
 ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
 ,REV_TRX.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
 ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
 ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
 ,REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,REV_TRX.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
 ,REV_TRX.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
 ,REV_TRX.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
 ,REV_TRX.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
 ,REV_TRX.DV_MISC_FLG                   
 ,REV_TRX.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
 ,REV_TRX.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
 ,REV_TRX.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
 ,REV_TRX.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
 ,REV_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
 ,REV_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
 ,REV_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,REV_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
 ,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            
 ,REV_TRX.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
 ,REV_TRX.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD  
 ,REV_TRX.GL_DT  
 ,REV_TRX.BK_SS_CD
 ,REV_TRX.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
 ,REV_TRX.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
 ,REV_TRX.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
 ,REV_TRX.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
 ,REV_TRX.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY
 ,REV_TRX.TRANSACTION_DT
 ,REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM
 ,REV_TRX.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
 ,REV_TRX.ACTION_CODE                   
 ,REV_TRX.DML_TYPE
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.SPLIT_PCT
 ,REV_TRX.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 ,REV_TRX.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 ,REV_TRX.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
 ,REV_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 ,REV_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY      
 ,REV_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD     
 ,COALESCE(REV_TRX.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN')     AS DV_ERP_DEAL_ID    
 ,COALESCE(REV_TRX.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD /* prbobba : added as part of Q1FY15*/
 ,REV_TRX.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD /*Added as part of Q3FY15 ICPM ICMS FIX */
 ,REV_TRX.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /*Added as part of Q3FY15 ICPM ICMS FIX */
 REV_TRX.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,  /*Added as part of Q3FY15 ICPM ICMS FIX */
 REV_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY           /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY                /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
,REV_TRX.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME /*Added as part ICPM Q2FY16*/
,COALESCE(REV_TRX.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */ 
,CASE WHEN RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT/10 < REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT THEN REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT*10+1 ELSE
RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT END AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT    /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_RV_ENDCUST_RET_AR_OOD_H REV_TRX
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=Cast(REV_TRX.GL_DT AS DATE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
ON RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND REV_TRX.GL_DT BETWEEN 
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM 
WHEN REV_TRX.GL_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_INV_REV_MEASURE WGL
    WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AND
         WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 AND WGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT)

SELECT
 EDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
 EDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD,
 EDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 EDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
 EDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD,
 EDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT,
 EDNRTFR.GL_DTM,
 EDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM,
 EDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM,
 EDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 EDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
 EDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 EDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
 EDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 EDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE,
 EDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
 EDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
 EDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 EDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 EDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
 EDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 EDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
 EDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT,
 EDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 EDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME,
 EDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 EDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
 EDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
 EDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 EDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
 EDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
 EDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
 EDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 EDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 EDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
 EDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 EDNRTFR.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 EDNRTFR.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 EDNRTFR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 EDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM,
 EDNRTFR.ACTION_CODE,
 EDNRTFR.DML_TYPE,
 EDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT ,
 EDNRTFR.GL_DT,
 EDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 EDNRTFR.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 EDNRTFR.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 EDNRTFR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  
 FROM 
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_INV_OOD EDNRTFR
 WHERE EDNRTFR.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

/*SQ_W_INV_REV_MEASURE*/
 SELECT 
 WDNRTINV.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY       REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_KEY     SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.PRODUCT_KEY     PRODUCT_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_KEY     AR_TRX_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY   BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT IN (-9999,-8888) THEN COALESCE(END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) 
 WHEN WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888) THEN COALESCE(SO_END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) ELSE -999 END AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY   SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY   DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 CASE  WHEN EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL 
   THEN -998 
   ELSE EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 END          GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.SALES_REP_NUM        SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 Cast(-9999 As Integer)      BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 Cast(-999 As Integer)       BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 Cast(-999 As Integer)       BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT      DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WDNRTINV.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 WDNRTINV.GL_DTM           DD_GL_DATETIME,
 WDNRTINV.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD       DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME       BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_DT     DV_FISCAL_DT,
 WDNRTINV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD   DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 CASE  WHEN WOXRTR.EXTRACT_TYPE='CORP_ADJ' 
   THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
   ELSE NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE 
 END         DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTINV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTINV.SERVICE_TYPE_CD         DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTINV.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD        BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 CASE  WHEN WOXRTR.EXTRACT_TYPE<>'CORP_ADJ' 
   THEN NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME   
   ELSE NULL 
 END           AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 'AR-OOD'        REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTINV.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 WDNRTINV.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG        DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTINV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTINV.DV_CHARGES_FLG      DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 WDNRTINV.DV_MISC_FLG     DV_MISC_FLG,
 WDNRTINV.DV_SERVICE_FLG     DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 WDNRTINV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG   DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WDNRTINV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG    DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WDNRTINV.DV_REVENUE_FLG     DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT       DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 CASE   WHEN  WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ'  
   THEN  0.0000000
       ELSE WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT    
 END           DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT        DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ'  
  THEN  0.0000000 
  ELSE COALESCE ( WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000 ) + COALESCE ( WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT, 0.000000 )  
 END              DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 COALESCE(WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000) + COALESCE(WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,0.000000)    DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 CASE WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 
  CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.LINE_TYPE_CD  ='LINE' THEN
   CAST(CAST(WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS DECIMAL(27,8))  * 
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(27,8))
      ELSE 0.000000    
      END
 ELSE 0.000000 
 END           DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ' 
   THEN 0.0000000
    ELSE WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT 
 END           DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT     DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('INV' , 'ERP_ADJ') 
 /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/ THEN CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' THEN 0 /*Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
   ELSE  DV_EXTENDED_QTY END
     WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'CM' THEN 
        CASE  WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
          THEN WDNRTINV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
          ELSE 0.000000
        END
    ELSE 0.000000  
  END          DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' 
 /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/   THEN CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' THEN 0 /*Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS FIX */ 
    ELSE     DV_EXTENDED_QTY END 
  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'CM' 
     THEN CASE  WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
        THEN WDNRTINV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
         ELSE 0.000000
       END
    ELSE 0.000000  
  END          DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY ,
 WDNRTINV.GL_DT,
 WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD,
 /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/ 
 CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE'ICMS%'AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN 0 ELSE WDNRTINV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  END EXTENDED_QTY,  
 WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 WDNRTINV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 WDNRTINV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 WDNRTINV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN 
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,'NA') IN ('PA','DA') THEN NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT ELSE NDCA.DV_TRANSACTION_DT END
 ELSE (CASE WHEN WOXRTR.EXTRACT_TYPE<>'CORP_ADJ'  THEN NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT   ELSE NULL END ) END TRANSACTION_DT  ,
 WDNRTINV.GL_POSTED_DTM ,
 WDNRTINV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY ,
 'I'        AS ACTION_CODE,
 'I'        AS DML_TYPE,
 WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ'  
  THEN  0.0000000 
  ELSE COALESCE ( WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000 ) + COALESCE ( WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT, 0.000000 )  
 END              DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 COALESCE(WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000) + COALESCE(WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT,0.000000)    DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,
 WDNRTINV.SPLIT_PCT,
 WDNRTINV.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 WDNRTINV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
 -999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
 WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 -9999 AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 WDNRTINV.PRODUCT_KEY DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 'STANDALONE' AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 /* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q3FY14 */
 COALESCE(NSORD.BK_DEAL_ID,NAT.BK_DEAL_ID) AS DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
 /* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q3FY14 */
 /* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q1FY15 */
 COALESCE(NSORD.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
 /* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q1FY15 */
  /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/ 
 CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN 'DM' ELSE TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 CASE WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  IN ('CM','DM') THEN DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT -WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' THEN  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT ELSE 0 END  DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('CM','DM') THEN DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT-WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT 
                 WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' THEN DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT ELSE 0 END DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
 /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/ 
 WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY           /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY                /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 ,COALESCE(NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */
,CASE WHEN RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT/10 <WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT THEN WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT*10+1 ELSE
RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT END AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT   /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/ 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_INV_OOD   WDNRTINV
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON ( WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_RV_OOD  WOXRTR
  ON ( WDNRTINV.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = WOXRTR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
  AND WOXRTR.GLOBAL_NAME  = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT 
  ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_KEY)
  /* ADDED as part of Q3FY15 ICPM ICMS */
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
 ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   /* ADDED as part of Q3FY15 ICPM ICMS */
 INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE  NATT
  ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER    NSORD 
  ON (WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORD.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE   NSOT
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=Cast(WDNRTINV.GL_DTM AS DATE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
ON RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(WDNRTINV.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND WDNRTINV.GL_DTM BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN WDNRTINV.GL_POSTED_DTM 
WHEN WDNRTINV.GL_DTM < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER  END_CUST
  ON  ( WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_END_CUSTOMER  SO_END_CUST
  ON  ( WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SO_END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVNGLA
  ON ( EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = WOXRTR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
  AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='BE') 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS  ECGA
  ON ( ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = WOXRTR.ACCOUNT_CODE) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE     NCCDR_FUNC
  ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WDNRTINV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= WDNRTINV.GL_DT
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
  ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= WDNRTINV.GL_DT 
  AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT NDCA
  ON(NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=WDNRTINV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
   ON(SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY =  WDNRTINV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
   ON (NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  NATIL /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */ 
  ON (NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
